metadata.author: hturbano
metadata.description: Reusable KPI and status DAX patterns for Power BI reports.

KPI_Status.name: KPI Status Indicator
KPI_Status.expression:
VAR Actual = [Base Measure]
VAR Target = [Target Measure]
VAR PctOfTarget = DIVIDE(Actual, Target, 0)
RETURN
    SWITCH(
        TRUE(),
        PctOfTarget >= 1, "On Track",
        PctOfTarget >= 0.9, "At Risk",
        "Off Track"
    )
KPI_Status.description: Returns On Track / At Risk / Off Track based on percentage of target achieved.

KPI_Status_Color.name: KPI Status Color Code
KPI_Status_Color.expression:
VAR Actual = [Base Measure]
VAR Target = [Target Measure]
VAR PctOfTarget = DIVIDE(Actual, Target, 0)
RETURN
    SWITCH(
        TRUE(),
        PctOfTarget >= 1, "#34A853",
        PctOfTarget >= 0.9, "#FBBC04",
        "#EA4335"
    )
KPI_Status_Color.description: Returns hex color code for conditional formatting based on KPI status.

KPI_Trend.name: KPI Trend Direction
KPI_Trend.expression:
VAR Current = [Base Measure]
VAR Previous = [MoM]
VAR Change = DIVIDE(Current - Previous, ABS(Previous), 0)
RETURN
    SWITCH(
        TRUE(),
        Change > 0.02, "Up",
        Change < -0.02, "Down",
        "Flat"
    )
KPI_Trend.description: Returns Up / Down / Flat based on month-over-month change.

SLA_Compliance.name: SLA Compliance Check
SLA_Compliance.description: Returns Met or Breached based on whether the average duration is within SLA.

SLA_Compliance_Pct.name: SLA Compliance Percentage
SLA_Compliance_Pct.description: Percentage of jobs that completed within SLA.

Days_Since_Last_Run.name: Days Since Last Run
Days_Since_Last_Run.description: Number of days since the most recent job run.

Pct_Change.name: Percentage Change
Pct_Change.description: Generic percentage change between two values.

Rank.name: Rank by Measure
Rank.description: Ranks categories by the specified measure in descending order.
